caption: Viewed at night through a convenience-store front window, a hooded man aims a handgun at a clerk standing behind the counter with hands raised; two customers crouch behind the shelves trying to hide.
annotator_notes: Image vs prompt: prompt mentioned 'several' crouching customers; image clearly shows 2 crouching figures, so person_2 and person_3 only. Hands-up clerk and crouching customers all at-risk Distress umbrella — active defensive response to imminent threat. Object_ids use the schema-required label_N form (person_N rather than clerk_/customer_). man_1 is the armed threat aimed at the clerk and within direct line-of-fire / scatter range of the crouching customers. Restored state synonyms: person_1 fleeing->surrendering (hands raised behind counter), person_2 fleeing->crouching (visibly crouched behind shelves), person_3 fleeing->crouching (visibly crouched by door).
